overall.description: First-person exploration through a foggy urban residential street at night in a survival horror game. The player character walks through narrow passages and open streets illuminated by sparse street lamps and neon signs, with heavy atmospheric fog severely limiting visibility. The environment features parked cars, brick buildings, and a prominent vertical 'LONELY' neon sign.

events.description: distant street lamps and neon signs emerge through the heavy fog ahead
exiting narrow alley into wider street with visible storefronts

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through the foggy narrow passage toward distant lights

entered.detail: tall brick wall with weathered texture running along the right side
red neon sign depicting a cocktail glass glowing through the fog
classic black street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, fog-filled alley between brick buildings with extremely limited visibility. As the camera moves forward, distant street lamps and a red neon cocktail sign gradually emerge through the haze, signaling the transition toward a more open urban street.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts before turning right at the corner

black metal fence running along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a foggy commercial street dominated by a prominent vertical 'LONELY' neon sign on the right. Street lamps cast pools of yellow light through the mist. The segment ends with a right turn at the corner, revealing parked cars and a metal fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked cars approaching intersection

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light visible through fog ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the foggy street toward the traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection
station wagon parked close to the sidewalk
trees with autumn foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down a residential street lined with parked cars and autumn trees. The camera approaches an intersection where a red traffic light hangs suspended in the fog. The heavy mist persists, obscuring distant buildings and creating an atmosphere of isolation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded alleyway into a desolate, mist-covered residential district. It begins between narrow brick buildings where visibility is severely limited, moving forward as distant street lamps and a red neon cocktail sign gradually emerge through the haze. The scene then opens onto a commercial street dominated by a prominent vertical LONELY neon sign, with yellow light pooling through the mist before the camera turns right at a corner past parked cars and a metal fence. Finally, the path shifts into a residential area lined with autumn trees and parked vehicles, approaching an intersection where a red traffic light hangs suspended in the heavy, isolating fog.
